name: Hermes
author: Resonant Alpha
description: Communication and coordination agent add-on for delegated messaging, follow-up, and channel workflows.

surfaces.label: Hermes Console
surfaces.description: Manage communication workflows, approvals, and delivery status.

surfaces.label: Hermes Workspace
surfaces.description: Embed the local Hermes dashboard, Kanban board, profiles, curator, and long-running goal controls in the central workspace.

tools.name: hermes.audit
tools.description: Run an executable audit of the local Hermes profile, command, config, identity, memory, skills, model metadata, and gateway state after shell access is granted. Passive profile inspection must not execute this tool.

tools.name: hermes.install
tools.description: Install the official Nous Research Hermes Agent into the selected local Hermes profile path after explicit user approval.

tools.name: hermes.chat
tools.description: Send a direct prompt to the existing local Hermes profile through the ResonantOS chat bridge.

tools.name: hermes.create_delegation_workspace
tools.description: Create an approval-gated Hermes delegation workspace for communication, coordination, routine research, or follow-up work.

tools.name: hermes.start_delegation_task
tools.description: Start a Hermes delegation task through the local Hermes profile and return reviewable artifacts without approving outbound sends.

tools.name: hermes.dashboard
tools.description: Start, stop, or inspect the embedded local Hermes dashboard workspace on loopback only.

notes: Hermes must request approval before public, external, or identity-sensitive sends.
Routine drafts and coordination plans may be prepared without sending.

workflowBoundaries.label: Delegated communication agent
workflowBoundaries.jobToBeDone: Use Hermes for communication, coordination, follow-up, and routine research tasks under ResonantOS supervision.
workflowBoundaries.userValue: The human can delegate communication work without giving Hermes trusted Strategist identity or unrestricted memory authority.
nonGoals: Send public or identity-sensitive messages without approval
Modify Hermes profile identity or memory without explicit approval
Write trusted Living Archive pages directly

skills.name: Hermes delegation
skills.description: Package the repeatable method for routing communication work to Hermes with approval gates and artifact return.

connectors.name: Hermes local profile
connectors.description: Connects ResonantOS to a locally installed Hermes profile through host-mediated shell and dashboard commands.

scripts.name: Hermes audit preflight
scripts.description: Run the Hermes audit tool before delegated execution to verify profile, runtime, model, and dashboard state.

checks: Hermes Agent version and update age
profile identity, skills, memory, and session inventory

augmentorSkills.objective: Use Hermes as a delegated communication, coordination, routine research, follow-up, and channel-workflow agent while preserving ResonantOS approval gates and Living Archive boundaries.
workflowPhases: inspect local profile passively until shell access is granted
grant workspace, install, provider, and archive capabilities separately
run executable audit only after shell access
detect or install Hermes after explicit network and shell grants
choose direct chat or delegation workspace
inject read-only Living Archive context when granted
run Hermes through the local profile
return reviewable drafts and approval requests
approvalGates: Ask before installing Hermes or modifying its profile, identity, skills, memory, or config.
Do not bundle provider, archive, network, or install access into workspace access.
Treat selected Hermes profile paths as untrusted roots; executing a profile-local binary requires shell access.
Bind and probe embedded Hermes dashboard surfaces on loopback only.
Ask before any public, external, financial, or identity-sensitive send.
Use Living Archive context as read-only evidence; trusted knowledge writes must go through reviewed ResonantOS intake.
expectedInputs: Hermes profile path when the default profile is not used
human approval for installation, remediation, or outbound sends
expectedOutputs: Hermes audit finding or installation result
